The '''[[Baragwin/Legends|Baragwin]] assault blade''' was an advanced (for its time) [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibrosword]] produced around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The weapon not only offered improved functionality, but was also fitted with [[Capacitor/Legends|capacitors]] that would discharge upon the blade's contact with a target. Empty space within the blade was reserved for the installation of common upgrade modules.

{{Weapon-stub}}
